series_metadata.series_title: Capital Projects--Evaluation of Contractors and Consultants
series_metadata.series_description: Records evaluating the work or performance of a trade contractor, construction manager, engineering firm, architect or other entity engaged in an Ohio Department of Natural Resources capital project. These records are usually generated/created by Division of Engineering's engineers or managers.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: project financial close or scanned and saved in an electronic format. ; Electronic: project financial close
